utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Therefore: included items are destination, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget = 5 items fully specified; travel_dates is not fully specified. Total items = 6; included fully = 5.
